description: Style Notefootwear for men, from ESTD.1977, is designed in the studios of London and Milan to provide comfort to the fashion conscious man using the finest of handcrafted leathers and highest manufacturing techniques.  So pair this sandal with with your off-duty ensembles and look good from head-to-toe. Product DetailsGrey sandal with thong style strap and a toe separatorMildly padded footbed with cool print and branding on the heelTPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
